codeReview.summary: This fix adequately addresses the prior scrutiny failure. The original regression came from `cfbd70b1a87f45e0524b6a677b61f16752dbfe2d`, which changed `/api/heartbeat-runs/:runId/events` and `/api/heartbeat-runs/:runId/log` to board-only auth and broke the shipped `papierklammer heartbeat run --api-key ...` flow. Commit `9fdc11342a4bbe3180e0ba6f1ad398ffde90c062` introduces `assertAuthenticated()` in `server/src/routes/authz.ts:10-18` and uses it only for those two streaming endpoints in `server/src/routes/agents.ts:2241-2275`, while leaving run detail and cancellation board-only at `server/src/routes/agents.ts:2172-2208`. The updated regression tests in `server/src/__tests__/heartbeat-run-routes-auth.test.ts:134-150,181-190,219-230,233-268` cover the intended same-company agent success plus wrong-company and unauthenticated denial cases. I did not find any new high-confidence correctness issues in the fix.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed feature review, the fix feature handoff/transcript skeleton, and commit `9fdc11342a4bbe3180e0ba6f1ad398ffde90c062`. The fix is narrowly scoped, restores the agent-authenticated heartbeat CLI streaming flow that the prior review flagged, and preserves the remaining board-only heartbeat run contracts, so this review passes.
